rulings.Case Title: JAMES KEARNEY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 5, 2024, in Department 301, Line 1. Defendant Key Air Conditioning Co.'s Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is HEARING REQUIRED. Non-Opposition filed by Plaintiffs. Counsel for Plaintiffs and Defendant are ordered present. Counsel may appear in person or remotely via zoom. Defendant did not demonstrate grounds for the Court to invoke its inherent, equitable power to set aside a default judgment on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. Specifically, Defendant's Notice of Motion states the motion is based on Code of Civil Procedure Section 473(b), however, Defendant fails to assert any "mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect." Defendant also fails to include the proposed pleading with its motion. Despite this, the motion primarily relies on the argument that extrinsic factors prevented Defendant from adequately presenting a defense. The moving party shall lodge with the clerk in Department 301 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling must email contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing and state their intention to contest. If a hearing is requested, it will be on November 5, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. Attorneys may appear in person or remotely via zoom: Meeting ID 160 757 8308; Passcode: 485029. Face coverings are optional. The Court no longer provides a court reporter in the Law and Motion department. Parties may retain their own reporter, who may appear in the courtroom or remotely. A retained reporter must be a California certified court reporter (CSR), for only a CSR's transcript may be used in California courts. If a CSR is being retained, include in your email all of the following: Their name, CSR and telephone number, and their individual work email address. There will be only one official record. If the parties cannot agree, the Court will designate a qualified court reporter to provide the official transcript for the matter, and the party or parties will bear the cost. = (302/RCE)
